news.title: Yep, we’re using OpenClaw to date now
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Ben Guez has "a bunch of potential international wives in [his] DMs," thanks to an automated script he set up using OpenClaw, Claude code, and Instagram trials.

news.title: Indian tech tycoon bets $30M of his own money to build AI alternative to Microsoft Office
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Neo is Bhavin Turakhia’s fifth venture and his latest involving enterprise software. This time he's taking on Microsoft Office and Google Apps with AI.

news.title: Enterprise application software spend of $234 bn will be at risk from Agentic AI
news.description: [THE HINDU] Agentic AI changes the economics of software

news.title: Japan plans sovereign AI model, 10 million AI robots
news.description: [THE STAR] Japan plans to develop a homegrown artificial intelligence model and have 10 million AI-equipped robots operating in more than a dozen sectors by 2040, the government said.

news.title: Fear and anger brew inside Meta amid AI frenzy
news.description: [THE JAPAN TIMES ] After weathering layoffs, some Meta employees were reassigned to an internal artificial intelligence training initiative that has drawn accusations of surveillance.

news.title: For 3 years, cops ‘inflated’ salaries. Then AI spotted it
news.description: [THE INDIAN EXPRESS] Three police constables from Chhattisgarh's Bastar were arrested this week after government auditors used Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools to uncover an alleged salary fraud.

news.title: KPIT outlook shock sends IT stocks sliding as growth worries intensify
news.description: [THE ECONOMIC TIMES] Mid-cap IT stocks faced a significant downturn Wednesday, led by KPIT Technologies' warning of a near-term revenue slowdown. This has amplified investor worries about Artificial Intelligence's impact on India's software services sector. Several...

news.title: This tiny AI PC stuffs 128GB RAM, 126 TOPS, and a leather handle into one absurd box
news.description: [TECHRADAR] MINIX mini PCs pack 128GB of RAM for memory-hungry LLM workloads

news.title: Is Artificial Intelligence 'Killing' Decision-Making Capabilities? We Asked Young Professionals
news.description: [INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS TIMES] AI has emerged as one of the most transformative technologies since the dot-com boom. Is it simply helping us work faster and more efficiently, or are users increasingly depending on it for

news.title: The UN Has Formed a Panel To Help Regulate The AI Boom And Issued a Stark Warning
news.description: [INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS TIMES] A United Nations panel has warned that artificial intelligence is moving to quickly and poses the potential to cause catastrophic harm.

news.title: Samsung Chases TSMC With Quantum-Powered Chipmaking as AI Reshapes the Most Critical Step in Fabrication
news.description: [WCCFTECH] Korean chip manufacturing giant Samsung is developing simulation technologies for lithography that rely on quantum computing and artificial intelligence, suggests a report from the Korean press. The technology will be used to run simulations of the...

news.title: Trump honors 'freakin' wild life' of Teddy Roosevelt, interacts with AI-powered ex-prez in North Dakota visit
news.description: [NEW YORK POST] MEDORA, ND — President Trump paid tribute to Theodore Roosevelt as a “great man" while cutting the ribbon to his new presidential library in the Dakota Badlands — after interacting with an artificial intelligence-powered hologram of his predecessor.

news.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

news.title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.

news.title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.

news.title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.
